name: Medieval Knights
creator: Pickaxe Studios
shortDesc: 24 hand-crafted medieval character skins including knights, wizards, archers, and royalty. HD detail with custom slim and classic variants.
longDesc: Medieval Knights is a collection of 24 hand-crafted medieval character skins for Minecraft Bedrock Edition featuring knights, wizards, archers, rogues, and royalty. All skins include both slim and classic body variants with HD detail.
features: 24 Unique Character Skins — Knights, wizards, archers, rogues, and royalty
HD Detail — High-resolution textures on every skin
Slim & Classic Variants — Both body types included for every skin
Works Everywhere — Equip in any world, server, or game mode

reviews.author: MedievalFan
reviews.text: Love the attention to detail. The knight skins look amazing in-game.

faqs.question: How many skins are in the Medieval Knights pack?
faqs.answer: The Medieval Knights skin pack contains 24 unique character skins with both slim and classic body variants for each.
